archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) combined with Archetype 4 (High-Contrast for Data)

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing but optimized for POS touch accuracy. Large hit targets.
spacing_and_layout.padding: p-6 or p-8 for containers, p-4 for cards
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for playful, tactile feel

components.buttons: Tactile style: Use flat backgrounds with a darker border-b-4 to mimic a physical button. On active/press, translate-y-1 and reduce border-b to 0 for a pressed effect.
components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), rounded-3xl, 2px border (#E2E8F0), no massive drop shadow. Subtle shadow-sm on hover.
components.cart_sidebar: Glassmorphism if floating, or solid white with a 1px border-l if fixed.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized with rounded-full or rounded-2xl, border-2 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/20
components.pincode: Large touchable keypad with circular or rounded-2xl buttons, high contrast.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105) or physical button press effect.

icons_and_assets.style: Stroke width 2.5 or 3 for a bolder, playful look

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over primary buttons is white or very dark for APCA standards.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="checkout-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Multi-user POS and Admin Dashboard application.
Set the overall theme to LIGHT. Use a vibrant, colorful, and playful aesthetic suitable for a fast-paced environment (touch-friendly targets, rounded shapes).
Use 'Nunito' for headings and 'Figtree' for body text.
Layout should be dense but padded properly to ensure clear touch targets (Control Room Grid).
Implement tactile buttons (e.g., border-b-4 mimicking a real button) for key POS actions.
Do NOT use raw HTML selects or date inputs. Use Shadcn customized components.
The interface should have distinct areas: Left/Center for Product Grid, Right for Cart/Billing.
For the Admin area, use vibrant accents for KPIs (e.g., bright orange/blue cards on off-white backgrounds).
Use lucide-react icons heavily, with stroke-width: 2.5 or 3 for a chunkier, friendly feel.
